name: osdu-qa-workflow
description: Test QA skill activation for test execution, failure analysis, and environment comparison

steps.name: list-collections
steps.prompt: what test collections are available for OSDU QA testing?

steps.name: check-environment
steps.prompt: check if the cimpl/lab environment is healthy and ready for testing

steps.name: analyze-failures
steps.prompt: the storage tests are showing 24% pass rate — what's causing the failures?

assertions.description: Analyzes failure patterns and identifies root causes

steps.name: boundary-test
steps.prompt: what terraform modules are we using for the AKS cluster?

assertions.description: Boundary: routes to iac domain, not QA
